exercises.name: Bent-Over Barbell Row
exercises.notes: Overhand grip, hinge to ~45°. Pull bar to lower chest, control the descent. Sub with machine row if preferred.

exercises.name: Single Arm DB Row
exercises.notes: Brace on bench. Drive elbow up and back — not just up. Full stretch at bottom.

exercises.name: Lat Pulldown
exercises.notes: Neutral or underhand grip today for variety. Pull to upper chest.

exercises.name: Rear Delt Fly
exercises.notes: Cables crossed, pull back and out. Or use pec deck in reverse. Squeeze rear delts.

exercises.name: Incline DB Curl
exercises.notes: Incline bench, arm hangs at full stretch. Deep stretch — great for long head growth.
